channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Czech public media staff strike citing government threat to independence
item.description: Plan to put funding under direct control has sparked widespread opposition, with critics fearing political interference.

item.title: US judge blocks Trump administration subpoena against Minnesota officials
item.description: Ruling represents setback for investigation that targeted state Democratic officials who criticised immigration raids.

item.title: ‘Another day, another leader’: Britons react to Keir Starmer’s exit
item.description: Londoners shared mixed reactions to Keir Starmer's resignation.

item.title: Fire at animation studio in India’s Lucknow kills at least 14
item.description: The blaze broke out in a commercial building with a library and animation studio, killing mostly college students.

item.title: Palestinian children ‘unprotected’ as NGOs forced out of Gaza and West Bank
item.description: Israel is pushing humanitarian groups and rights defenders to scale down operations in occupied Palestinian territories.

item.title: Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister?
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced his resignation after just two years in office.

item.title: 15 killed after a fire ignited in a coaching centre in Lucknow, India
item.description: 15 killed after a fire ignited in a coaching centre in Lucknow, India.

item.title: Artist creates Kerala’s ‘coconut rib’ World Cup trophy
item.description: An artist in Kerala has created a handmade model of the FIFA World Cup trophy, using coconut leaf and cardboard.

item.title: Qatar PM on preventing US-Iran talks from escalation
item.description: Qatar's PM said that safeguards have been put in place to prevent US-Iran negotiations from regional escalation.

item.title: Lionel Messi scores brace as Argentina beat Austria 2–0 at World Cup 2026
item.description: Messi scores twice to become all-time leading scorer in men's World Cup history as Argentina reach knockout rounds.

item.title: Canadian police officer, suspect among 3 dead in Montreal shooting
item.description: Few details available after law enforcement say suspected attacker 'neutralised' in city of Montreal.

item.title: Thousands of kites soar over Denmark at annual beach festival
item.description: Roughly 25,000 kites flew over the Danish island of Fano for its annual International Kite Fliers Meeting.

item.title: US raises concern as RSF forces encircle Sudanese city of el-Obeid
item.description: US calls for negotiated solution and expresses alarm over potential 'mass atrocities' as paramilitary surrounds city.

item.title: A leftward lurch? What to know about the Democratic primaries in New York
item.description: Democratic socialist candidates push for an edge in US races that hinge on issues like Israel policy and inequality.

item.title: Messi breaks World Cup’s all-time scoring record with 17th goal vs Austria
item.description: Lionel Messi is tournament's all-time and current edition's leading goal scorer with 17 and four goals, respectively.

item.title: Lebanon discusses ‘deconfliction’ mechanism ahead of Israel talks
item.description: Mediators Qatar and Pakistan say plan seeks to ensure the end of military operations in Lebanon.

item.title: Qatar’s PM tells Al Jazeera progress made in US-Iran talks
item.description: Qatar's PM said US-Iran talks in Switzerland laid the groundwork for a final deal after 18 hours of discussions.

item.title: Kenyan court finds minister in contempt over US Ebola site
item.description: Health Minister Duale disobeyed an order to halt construction at the proposed facility for infected US nationals, court says.

item.title: Will a US-Iran deal transform the Iranian economy?
item.description: A US-Iran deal could unlock frozen assets, oil exports, and investment, reshaping Iran's economic future.

item.title: South African police tighten security as anti-migrant deadline approaches
item.description: Xenophobic protest groups have demanded that undocumented foreigners leave the country by June 30 .

item.title: Marco Rubio heads to Middle East to address Iran MoU, Hormuz
item.description: Rubio to visit UAE, Kuwait and Bahrain for talks on Iran and Hormuz priorities from June 23 to June 25.

item.title: LIVE: France vs Iraq – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow updates as Mbappe's France play Iraq in Group I, including the build-up, analysis and live text commentary.

item.title: Canada’s inflation hits 29-month high amid heightened oil prices
item.description: Petrol prices lead the surge with a 33.2 percent price increase on an annual basis.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israeli attacks surge despite ceasefire efforts
item.description: Israeli attacks intensify across southern Lebanon despite ongoing diplomatic efforts.

item.title: US partially lifts Iran oil sanctions amid ‘encouraging’ talks
item.description: The move, expected under the MoU, comes as Vice President JD Vance says there's a 'good foundation' for a final deal.
